item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three source files, make the scoped schema/model/query changes, then run the test suite.

item.text: The database schema uses a different physical JSON column than the model’s `doc` alias, so I’m checking the live table metadata and will align the schema constraint without changing the existing query/model behavior.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node --input-type=module -e 'import { withDb } from \"./src/db.mjs\"; await withDb(async (client) => { const result = await client.query(\"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = "'$1 ORDER BY ordinal_position", ["accounts"]); console.log(result.rows); });'"'"

item.text:
Implemented `preferredPaymentMethod` support across schema, account create/update, and order summaries.

`npm test` passes.
